sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92355" key="r(hso/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥησός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρχός, ὃς αἱρέσει</ref> </xr> (dub.l.) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὰ θέσφατα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:205" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">205</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
